properties.scriptMethodHeader: def Script(spark: SparkSession, in0: DataFrame) -> DataFrame:

properties.code_string:
<Node ToolID="5_28">
      <GuiSettings Plugin="AlteryxRPluginGui.R">
        <Position y="491.1002" x="516"/>
      </GuiSettings>
      <Properties>
        <Configuration>
          <RScript>######
# Helper function
my.topo.colors <- function (n, alpha = 1) 
{
    if ((n <- as.integer(n[1L])) > 0) {
        j <- n%/%3
        k <- n%/%3
        i <- n - j - k
        c(if (i > 0) hsv(h = seq.int(from = 43/60, to = 31/60, length.out = i), alpha = alpha),
			if (j > 0) hsv(h = seq.int(from = 23/60, to = 11/60, length.out = j), alpha = alpha),
			if (k > 0) hsv(h = seq.int(from = 10/60, to = 0, length.out = k), 
            alpha = alpha, s = 1, v = 1))
    }
    else character()
}

######
# Main macro script
loadPackages("MASS")

the.data <- read.Alteryx("#1")

# Get the user specified parameters for the bivariate density estimation and do the estimation
if (suppressWarnings(!is.na(as.numeric('%Question.bandwidth%')))) {
	the.bandwidth <- paste(", h =", %Question.bandwidth%)
} else {
	the.bandwidth <- NULL
}
grid.points <- paste(", n =", %Question.grid.points%)
the.dens <- eval(parse(text = paste("kde2d(the.data[[1]], the.data[[2]]", the.bandwidth, grid.points, ")", sep="")))

# Get the user specified heat plot options and produce the heat plot
#
# Address plot axes customization if one or both fields represent ordered categories
x.labels <- NULL
y.labels <- NULL
x.lines <- 2
y.lines <- 2
if ('%Question.ordered.categories%' == "True") {
	if (nchar('%Question.x.labels%') > 0) {
		x.labs <- unlist(strsplit('%Question.x.labels%', ","))
		if (length(unique(the.data[[1]])) != length(x.labs)) {
			AlteryxMessage("The number of horizontal category labels does not match the number of horizontal categories, default axis labeling will be used.", iType = 2, iPriority = 3)
		} else {
			x.labels <- x.labs
			x.lines <- max(nchar(x.labels)) + 1
		}
	}
	if (nchar('%Question.y.labels%') > 0) {
		y.labs <- unlist(strsplit('%Question.y.labels%', ","))
		if (length(unique(the.data[[2]])) != length(y.labs)) {
			AlteryxMessage("The number of vertical category labels does not match the number of vertical categories, default axis labeling will be used.", iType = 2, iPriority = 3)
		} else {
			y.labels <- y.labs
			y.lines <- max(nchar(y.labels)) + 1
		}
	}
}
custom.axis.labels <- FALSE
if (!is.null(x.labels) || !is.null(y.labels)) {
	custom.axis.labels <- TRUE
	if (x.lines > 5 || y.lines > 4) {
		ratio.xy <- (x.lines - 1)/(y.lines - 1)
		cex.x <- 1
		cex.y <- 1
		top.x <- 1 + (1/3)
		if (ratio.xy > top.x)
			cex.x <- 0.75
		if (ratio.xy <= 1.33333 && ratio.xy > 1)
			cex.x <- 1/ratio.xy
		if (ratio.xy < 0.75)
			cex.y <- 0.75
		if (ratio.xy >= 0.75 && ratio.xy < 1)
			cex.y <- ratio.xy
		if (cex.x != 1) {
			num.lines <- ceiling(0.5*cex.x*max(x.lines, y.lines))
		} else {
			num.lines <- ceiling(0.5*cex.x*max(x.lines, y.lines))
		}
	} else {
		cex.x <- 1
		cex.y <- 1
		num.lines <- ceiling(0.75*max(x.lines, y.lines))
	}
}

# If one axis has custom labels, but the other does not, create a reasonable set
# of labels for the fields without custom labels (this capability is not in the
# underlying filled.contour function
no.x <- FALSE
if (custom.axis.labels && is.null(x.labels)) {
	no.x <- TRUE
	x.labels <- axisTicks(c(min(the.data[[1]]), max(the.data[[1]])), log = FALSE)
}
no.y <- FALSE
if (custom.axis.labels && is.null(y.labels)) {
	no.y <- TRUE
	y.labels <- axisTicks(c(min(the.data[[2]]), max(the.data[[2]])), log = FALSE)
}

# The Vertical and horizontal axis labels
the.xlab <- names(the.data)[1]
if (nchar('%Question.horizontal.field%') > 0)
	the.xlab <- '%Question.horizontal.field%'
the.ylab <- names(the.data)[2]
if (nchar('%Question.vertical.field%') > 0)
	the.ylab <- '%Question.vertical.field%'
	
# Determine if the user has specified key labels, and prep them for use if yes
use.key <- FALSE
if ('%Question.plot.key%' == "True")
	use.key <- TRUE
use.key.labels <- FALSE
if (use.key && nchar('%Question.key.labels%') > 0) {
	key.labels <- trim.blanks(unlist(strsplit('%Question.key.labels%', ",")))
	if (length(key.labels) == 2)
		use.key.labels <- TRUE
}

# Create the actual heatmap
whr <- graphWHR(inches = '%Question.inches%', in.w = '%Question.in.w%', in.h = '%Question.in.h%', cm.w = '%Question.cm.w%', cm.h = '%Question.cm.h%', resolution = '%Question.graph.resolution%', print.high = FALSE)
AlteryxGraph(1, width = whr[1], height = whr[2], res = whr[3])
if (custom.axis.labels) {
	par(mar = c(max(5, num.lines + 1), max(4, num.lines + 1), 3, 2) + 0.1)
	if (use.key && use.key.labels) {
		if (!no.x && !no.y) {
			filled.contour(the.dens, color.palette = %Question.col.func%, nlevels = %Question.nlevels%, las = 2,
				plot.axes = { axis(1, at = 1:length(x.labels), labels = x.labels, cex.axis = cex.x)
					axis(2, at = 1:length(y.labels), labels = y.labels, cex.axis = cex.y) },
				plot.title = title(xlab = the.xlab, ylab = the.ylab, line = num.lines),
				key.title = title(main = paste("\n\n", '%Question.key.title%', sep = ""), cex.main = 0.8),
				key.axes = axis(4, at = c(min(the.dens$z), max(the.dens$z)), labels = key.labels, cex.axis = 0.8)
			)
		}
		if (no.x) {
			filled.contour(the.dens, color.palette = %Question.col.func%, nlevels = %Question.nlevels%, las = 2,
				plot.axes = { axis(1, at = x.labels, labels = x.labels, cex.axis = cex.x)
					axis(2, at = 1:length(y.labels), labels = y.labels, cex.axis = cex.y) },
				plot.title = title(xlab = the.xlab, ylab = the.ylab, line = num.lines),
				key.title = title(main = paste("\n\n", '%Question.key.title%', sep = ""), cex.main = 0.8),
				key.axes = axis(4, at = c(min(the.dens$z), max(the.dens$z)), labels = key.labels, cex.axis = 0.8)
			)
		}
		if (no.y) {
			filled.contour(the.dens, color.palette = %Question.col.func%, nlevels = %Question.nlevels%, las = 2,
				plot.axes = { axis(1, at = 1:length(x.labels), labels = x.labels, cex.axis = cex.x)
					axis(2, at = y.labels, labels = y.labels, cex.axis = cex.y) },
				plot.title = title(xlab = the.xlab, ylab = the.ylab, line = num.lines),
				key.title = title(main = paste("\n\n", '%Question.key.title%', sep = ""), cex.main = 0.8),
				key.axes = axis(4, at = c(min(the.dens$z), max(the.dens$z)), labels = key.labels, cex.axis = 0.8)
			)
		}
	}
	if (use.key && !use.key.labels) {
		if (!no.x && !no.y) {
			filled.contour(the.dens, color.palette = %Question.col.func%, nlevels = %Question.nlevels%, las = 2,
				plot.axes = { axis(1, at = 1:length(x.labels), labels = x.labels, cex.axis = cex.x)
					axis(2, at = 1:length(y.labels), labels = y.labels, cex.axis = cex.y) },
				plot.title = title(xlab = the.xlab, ylab = the.ylab, line = num.lines),
				key.title = title(main = paste("\n\n", '%Question.key.title%', sep = ""), cex.main = 0.8)
			)
		}
		if (no.x) {
			filled.contour(the.dens, color.palette = %Question.col.func%, nlevels = %Question.nlevels%, las = 2,
				plot.axes = { axis(1, at = x.labels, labels = x.labels, cex.axis = cex.x)
					axis(2, at = 1:length(y.labels), labels = y.labels, cex.axis = cex.y) },
				plot.title = title(xlab = the.xlab, ylab = the.ylab, line = num.lines),
				key.title = title(main = paste("\n\n", '%Question.key.title%', sep = ""), cex.main = 0.8)
			)
		}
		if (no.y) {
			filled.contour(the.dens, color.palette = %Question.col.func%, nlevels = %Question.nlevels%, las = 2,
				plot.axes = { axis(1, at = 1:length(x.labels), labels = x.labels, cex.axis = cex.x)
					axis(2, at = y.labels, labels = y.labels, cex.axis = cex.y) },
				plot.title = title(xlab = the.xlab, ylab = the.ylab, line = num.lines),
				key.title = title(main = paste("\n\n", '%Question.key.title%', sep = ""), cex.main = 0.8)
			)
		}
	}
	if (!use.key) {
		eval(parse(text = paste("image(the.dens$x, the.dens$y, the.dens$z, xaxt = 'n', yaxt = 'n', col = ", "%Question.col.func%", "(", %Question.nlevels%, "), ", "xlab = '', ylab = '')", sep = "")))
		if (!no.x && !no.y) {
			axis(1, at = 1:length(x.labels), las = 2, labels = x.labels, cex.axis = cex.x)
			axis(2, at = 1:length(y.labels), las = 2, labels = y.labels, cex.axis = cex.y)
		}
		if (no.x) {
			axis(1, at = x.labels, las = 2, labels = x.labels, cex.axis = cex.x)
			axis(2, at = 1:length(y.labels), las = 2, labels = y.labels, cex.axis = cex.y)
		}
		if (no.y) {
			axis(1, at = 1:length(x.labels), las = 2, labels = x.labels, cex.axis = cex.x)
			axis(2, at = y.labels, las = 2, labels = y.labels, cex.axis = cex.y)
		}
		title(xlab = the.xlab, ylab = the.ylab, line = num.lines)
	}
} else {
	if (use.key && use.key.labels) {
		filled.contour(the.dens, color.palette = %Question.col.func%, nlevels = %Question.nlevels%,
			plot.title = title(xlab = the.xlab, ylab = the.ylab),
			key.title = title(main = paste("\n\n", '%Question.key.title%', sep = ""), cex.main = 0.8),
			key.axes = axis(4, at = c(min(the.dens$z), max(the.dens$z)), labels = key.labels)
		)
	}
	if (use.key && !use.key.labels) {
		filled.contour(the.dens, color.palette = %Question.col.func%, nlevels = %Question.nlevels%,
			plot.title = title(xlab = the.xlab, ylab = the.ylab),
			key.title = title(main = paste("\n\n", '%Question.key.title%', sep = ""), cex.main = 0.8),
		)
	}
	if (!use.key) {
		eval(parse(text = paste("image(the.dens$x, the.dens$y, the.dens$z, col = ", "%Question.col.func%", "(", %Question.nlevels%, "), xlab = the.xlab, ylab = the.ylab)", sep = "")))
	}
}
invisible(dev.off())
</RScript>
          <UseFullUpdate value="False"/>
        </Configuration>
        <Annotation DisplayMode="0">
          <Name/>
          <DefaultAnnotationText/>
          <Left value="False"/>
        </Annotation>
        <MetaInfo connection="Output1">
          <RecordInfo>
            <Field type="V_WString" source="Report:R-Graph:" size="1073741823" name="Graph"/>
          </RecordInfo>
        </MetaInfo>
      </Properties>
      <EngineSettings EngineDllEntryPoint="AlteryxR" EngineDll="AlteryxRPluginEngine.dll"/>
    </Node>

<Node ToolID="30">
      <GuiSettings>
        <Position y="642" x="1218"/>
      </GuiSettings>
      <Properties>
        <Configuration>
          <Value name="BatchMacroGroupBy">Control=DrawingNo
Input10=DrawingNo
</Value>
          <Value name="ControlParams">Control Parameter (4)=DrawingNo
</Value>
        </Configuration>
        <Annotation DisplayMode="0">
          <Name/>
          <AnnotationText>Build each drawing out - we need to batch since there can be multiple stroke per drawing.</AnnotationText>
          <DefaultAnnotationText/>
          <Left value="False"/>
        </Annotation>
        <Dependencies>
          <Implicit>
            <Dependency IsAlias="False" IsOutput="False" IsMacro="True" Package="True" Path="_externals\2\batches_of_apples.yxmc"/>
